title: Angel origins and suchlike
wikitext:
[]: Angel origins and suchlike             Quote Post by V » Fri Mar 14, 2008 12:24 pm If there's another thread on this Search couldn't find it: "How did the Angels physically get to the locations they were spread to around the world?" Judging from Sandalphon, it would appear that the Angels were spread around the world as "embryos/seeds" that then matured, then began to attack Tokyo-3. They must have been spread to fairly isolated places where no one would easily find them, i.e. a volcano or probably the deep sea floor. The theory I ascribe to is that the explosion of Second Impact physically flung these embryos around the planet, and then they matured. The Angels did come from Adam and Adam came from the White Moon, thus the Angels also came from the the White Moon transport. I hear this other theory that Second Impact ONLY spread the SOULS of the Angels, to their inert bodies which were ALREADY spread around the world; if so, how did their inert bodies get there?

[]:             Quote Post by slothen » Fri Mar 14, 2008 12:37 pm catapult

[]: Re: How were the Angels spread?             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Mar 14, 2008 3:44 pm V wrote: I hear this other theory that Second Impact ONLY spread the SOULS of the Angels, to their inert bodies which were ALREADY spread around the world

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Fri Mar 14, 2008 9:18 pm In the Proposal, Angels were buried all over the world by the FAR, and woke up post-2I to wreak havoc. That might be the case. I can't imagine how a monster like Sahaquiel could've gotten tossed into Earth orbit or otherwise without being detected. Either that, or they somehow got shoved underground and into the magma...which seems to be stretching it for everyone except Sandalphon. As usual, there's no direct explanation as to where all of them came from.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Mar 14, 2008 9:28 pm I don't remember it saying "buried" exactly. Also, Proposal =/= Final Series. I also don't see the sense in the FAR ever influencing Earth events directly. If they're going to be wandering around and tampering with their Seed's planets, that makes the "sending Seeds out in Moons" stuff a bit unnecessary. I just assume the fact that the Angels weren't detected in the 15 years after 2I to be (A) plot contrivance, (B) bonus of the Earth being mostly covered in water, and (C) ATF Cloaking Technology.

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Fri Mar 14, 2008 9:34 pm Something that went into orbit during 2I and stayed in orbit could be visible from the ground itself. ATF Cloaking technology? Pfffffft. Proposal may not be equal to Final Series, but what it says need not be irrelevant.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Mar 14, 2008 10:02 pm UrsusArctos wrote: ATF Cloaking technology?

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Fri Mar 14, 2008 10:04 pm UrsusArctos wrote: Something that went into orbit during 2I and stayed in orbit could be visible from the ground itself.

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Fri Mar 14, 2008 10:04 pm I don't know if that should be removed, but I guess...yeah. It's quite a mess, whatever way you look at it.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Mar 14, 2008 10:10 pm UrsusArctos wrote: I don't know if that should be removed, but I guess...yeah.

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Fri Mar 14, 2008 10:41 pm http://www.evageeks.org/FGP/Theory:S%C2%B2_Engine%27s_Absence_in_Evangelions#Artificial_Installation Be happy to blow off anything here that isn't appropriate (I think I'll remove one myself, come to think of it).

[]:             Quote Post by CorporalChaos » Fri Mar 14, 2008 11:20 pm Wasn't Adam on Earth some time before Lillith arrived? If this is true, couldn't it be possible that the Angels were wandering Earth when Lillith arrived, and when she disabled Adam with the Lance of Longinus, the Angels could have reverted to embryos until a time the Lance was removed from Adam around the time of Second Impact? This would have served as the catalyst for the Angels to awaken and begin to mature again. I'm not sure about any of this, the backstory is a little fuzzy to me. I suppose I'll have to go read about it again.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Mar 15, 2008 6:44 am CorporalChaos wrote: Wasn't Adam on Earth some time before Lillith arrived?

[]:             Quote Post by Zuggy » Sat Mar 15, 2008 9:37 am V wrote: If there's another thread on this Search couldn't find it: "How did the Angels physically get to the locations they were spread to around the world?" Judging from Sandalphon, it would appear that the Angels were spread around the world as "embryos/seeds" that then matured, then began to attack Tokyo-3. They must have been spread to fairly isolated places where no one would easily find them, i.e. a volcano or probably the deep sea floor. The theory I ascribe to is that the explosion of Second Impact physically flung these embryos around the planet, and then they matured.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Mar 15, 2008 10:33 am I thought we already argued against this one, Zug? Starting here , and still as applicable as it was before.

[]:             Quote Post by Zuggy » Sat Mar 15, 2008 11:27 am There only seems to be a couple of responses there from Yojimbo and Evafan. Don't understand what Evafan is getting at, and Yojimbo says that it's impossible because each chunk would need a S^2 device and soul, even though we don't know if an S^2 device can be grown or even what a S^2 is to begin with.

[]:             Quote Post by V » Sat Mar 15, 2008 3:25 pm In the Proposal, Angels were buried all over the world by the FAR

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Sat Mar 15, 2008 9:01 pm Zugzwang wrote: Don't understand what Evafan is getting at

[]:             Quote Post by Zuggy » Sun Mar 16, 2008 10:19 am Anonymous_Evafan wrote: Misato: They plan to initiate Third Impact - not with Angels, but by using the Eva series. 15 years ago, Second Impact was caused by humans on purpose. But that was in order to minimize the damage by returning Adam to an embryonic state before the other Angels awoke .

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Sun Mar 16, 2008 10:51 am You're the only one it sounds that way to. I don't even see a point to debating this with you it's obvious you'll just spin things to suit your ideas.
